calendar.matters:
Petition For Suspension Of Powers And Removal Of Co-Executor Marilyn Folsom, Issuance Of Letters Testamentary, And For Instructions Re: Payment Of Accountant'S Bill And For Distribution Of Remaining Balance Of Tax Reserve
Off Calendar Dec-05-2012 Off Calendar

PETITION FOR INSTRUCTIONS
Off Calendar Oct-19-2009 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Marilyn Young for Janice Vaillancourt. James Hastings for Marilyn Folsom.

Mr. Hastings pointed out that schedule G of the tax return had not been filled out and that he wanted the authority to take over. Ms. Young stated that the accountant was slow in getting things back to her due to health issues, that Ms. Vaillancourt was also having health issues, that they did the accounting, that Mr. Hastings had the information on the stocks and that she had no problem with having Mr. hastings take over the 2008 and 2009 taxes. In addition, she stated that she had the corrections on the 2007 returns and that she would provide them to Mr. Hastings. The Court stated that the responsibility of the 2008 and 2009 tax returns was turned over to Mr. Hastings. The Petition For Instructions was taken off calendar and is moot. The Court also stated that Counsel needed to work together to get the 2007 tax return done.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Arlene Howell, CSR#2542. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy J. Capozzoli.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Oct-29-2008 Granted Per Written Order

Petition Of Janice Vaillancourt, Co-Executor, For Reimbursement For Out-Of Pocket Expenses, And For Fee For Extrodinary Services.
Off Calendar Oct-29-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Marilyn Young for Janice Vaillancourt. James Hastings for Marilyn Folsom.

Mr. Hastings stated that a compromise had been reached with regard to many of the issues, but that the issue regarding reimbusrement and extraordinary fees still remained. The Parties presented oral argument to support their positions with respect to the remaining issues. The matter was taken under submission.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR#11722. Clerk: J. Alameda/R. Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy F. Brown.

Notice Of Motion To Substitute Attorneys, Declaration Of James R. Hastingsm Declaration Of Marilyn Folsom, And Memorandum Of Points And Authorities.
Off Calendar Jul-01-2008 Continued To Aug-05-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: James Hastings for Marilyn Folsom (Executor). Marilyn Young for Janice Vaillancourt (Co-Executor).

Mr. Hastings stated that both houses were sold a long time ago and that he was not the attorney at that time. In addition, he stated that the parties decided the fees would be spun off on a separate petition for final distribution and a separate petition for extraordinary fees. Ms. Young agreed and stated that the petition needed to be adjusted. The matter was continued to August 5, 2008.

Judge: Raymond Arata. Reporter: Peggy Tsujimoto CSR#5229. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. Harris.

MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Marilyn Young for Janice Vaillancourt (Co-Executor). James Hastings for Marilyn Folsom (Co-Executor).

The matter was continued to May 27, 2008 at Mr. Hastings request.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR#11722. Clerk: Rosie Noguera/ S. Ravinantapricha. Bailiff: J. Garrido.

Notice Of Motion To Substitute Attorneys, Declaration Of James R. Hastingsm Declaration Of Marilyn Folsom, And Memorandum Of Points And Authorities.
Off Calendar Mar-26-2008 Continued To Apr-23-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Marilyn Young for Janice Vaillancourt (Co-Executor). James Hastings for Marilyn King Folsom (Executor).

Ms. Young informed the Court that the Inventory and Appraisal had been filed on February 6th. In addition, she stated that she had provided some documents to Mr. Hastings. Mr. Hastings stated that he was ready to move forward, but that he needed all of the douments he had requested. The Court informed Counsel that he did not want to see duplication of work. The matter was continued to April 23, 2008. for status.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR#11722. Clerk: Rosie Noguera/ S. Ravinantapricha. Bailiff: Deputy Belen.

Notice Of Motion To Substitute Attorneys, Declaration Of James R. Hastingsm Declaration Of Marilyn Folsom, And Memorandum Of Points And Authorities.
Off Calendar Feb-06-2008 Continued To Mar-26-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: J. R. Hastings for Marilyn Folsom. Marilyn Young for Janice Vaillancourt.

Ms. Young informed the Court that she was filing the inventory and appraisal this morning. Mr. Hastings expressed that he needed to be susbituted in, that he needed the entire file in order to represent his client, and that the substitution was being held up for Ms. Young's fees. Ms. Young stated that the matter was close to being finished and that the only things pending were the petition for final distribution and the fiduciary returns. In addition, she stated that there was a fee agreement and asked the Court for guidance on how to resolve this issue. The Court directed Ms. Young to turn over the entire file that pertains to Mr. Hastings client. The Court stated that there is to be no duplication of work. Ms. Young represents Janice Vaillancourt and Mr. Hastings represents Marilyn Folsom. The matter was continued to March 26, 2008 for status on the petition for final distribution. No appearance is required if the petition is filed before that date. Counsel is to decide who will file the petition.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR# 11722. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Lewis.
